---
title: "This is the index.qmd page title"
---

If you don't want a separate your landing page (index.qmd) and your About page (about.qmd), you can make the landing page about you by putting the about.qmd content in the index.qmd.

This is a Quarto website.

## This is a header

With content ... 

### And a sub-header 

And more content ... 

And some links to other pages built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org/)

- [My Now page  ](now.qmd)

- [My Project Page](pages/project/index.qmd)

- [Go back home](index.qmd)
